name: openclaude-multiwindow
description: OpenClaude with multi-chat command centre — multiple chats simultaneously, each with its own model, tabbed in the sidebar with open-in-new-tab support.

commands.title: OpenClaude: Open Active Chat in Editor Tab
OpenClaude: Open Chat in New Editor Tab…

openclaude.launchCommand.description: Command run in the integrated terminal when launching OpenClaude.

openclaude.terminalName.description: Integrated terminal tab name for OpenClaude sessions.

openclaude.useOpenAIShim.description: Optionally set CLAUDE_CODE_USE_OPENAI=1 in launched OpenClaude terminals.

openclaude.modelCatalogExtras.description: Extra providers/models to add to the per-tab model picker. Each entry: { id, label, baseUrl?, defaultModel?, models: [{id, label}] }. Merged after the bundled catalog (30 providers / 116 models extracted from upstream openclaude gateways + brands).

openclaude.modelContextOverrides.description: Per-model context-window overrides (in tokens) for unknown models. Silences the '[context] Warning: model … not in context window table' message and tells the CLI what window to use. Example: { "grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning": 131072, "my-local-llama": 32768 }. Exposed to the CLI subprocess via env vars OPENCLAUDE_MODEL_CONTEXT_OVERRIDES (JSON) and OPENCLAUDE_CTX_<UPPER_MODEL> (int).

openclaude.providerEnvOverrides.description: Per-provider environment variable overrides injected when a chat uses a model from that provider. Keyed by provider id (e.g. "xai-direct", "groq", "openrouter"). Common use: set OPENAI_BASE_URL + OPENAI_API_KEY per provider so multi-provider chats work simultaneously. Example: { "xai-direct": { "OPENAI_BASE_URL": "https://api.x.ai/v1", "OPENAI_API_KEY": "xai-..." }, "qwen-direct": { "OPENAI_BASE_URL": "https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1", "OPENAI_API_KEY": "sk-..." } }. The provider id for a model is shown in the model picker's group header.

enumDescriptions: Prompt for permission on each tool use (requires manual approval)
Auto-approve file edits, prompt for other operations (recommended)
Read-only mode — no file modifications allowed
openclaude.permissionMode.description: Permission mode for chat sessions. Controls which tool operations are auto-approved.

openclaude.thinkingTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time (ms) before thinking is considered stuck (default 2 min)

openclaude.autoValidateModels.description: Automatically validate all models on startup (free check)

openclaude.modelVettingData.description: Model vetting data (vetted, broken, disabled lists). Managed via the model picker UI.
